title: stellaria vulgata
intro: Stellaria vulgata, also known as greater stitchwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Stellaria vulgata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
